category_sources: Official GitHub repository topic/README describes dist/cargo-dist as shippable application packaging and release distribution tooling.
source_facts.description says cargo-dist builds final distributable artifacts and uploads them to an archive.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official axodotdev/cargo-dist repository.
docs_sources: Official axodotdev/cargo-dist repository links to axodotdev.github.io/cargo-dist as the project site/docs.
source_facts.homepage is the official cargo-dist documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/axodotdev/cargo-dist, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies distributable artifact building and archive upload behavior.
source_facts.executables lists dist; official repository metadata describes Rust packaging, cargo, installers, and release automation.
